html:
Exclusive to:

The Commander's Helm is a wearable head slot Armor, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid after unlocking the Commander's Helm Skill and needs 2 Gold Nuggets, 2 Beefalo Wool and 1 Marble to craft.

The Commander's Helm has a durability of 683 and absorbs 80% of all physical Damage. It also protects Wigfrid from getting knockbacked by attacks.

Skill Upgrades

When Commander's Helm Enhancement I is unlocked, the Helm offers +8 Planar Protection.

When Commander's Helm Enhancement II is unlocked, Wigfrid's natural healing ability will repair her Commander's Helm when she continues to fight at maximum health.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

A touch of gold adds weight to its commanding appearance.

(associated with: )

(associated with: )
Wildflower Helm
These beautiful blooms have had to fight for survival in the unforgiving wilderness.

(associated with: )

Trivia

  • The Commander's Helm was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.

"wathgrithr_improvedhat"
“Does Wigfrid have any leadership experience? Or is she just winging it?”
–Wilson
“I don't think I could pull it off like she does.”
–Willow
“Ah yes, Stronglady hat. She not mind if Wolfgang wear?”
–Wolfgang
“Being a commander must be terribly lonely.”
–Wendy
“A RIDICULOUS HAT”
–WX-78
“An even further departure from historical accuracy, I'm afraid.”
–Wickerbottom
“Minus the wings and horn, it's basically a toque.”
–Woodie
“Now she's just showing off.”
–Maxwell
“The unicorn hath bestowed its power onto me.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we wear it? Pleeeaaase?”
–Webber
“Mademoiselle Wigfrid does have a very commanding presence.”
–Warly
“Tweeter hat”
–Wormwood
“Wonder if it's made from real unicorn...”
–Winona
“One horn must do if not born with two.”
–Wortox
“Many wings on Viking lady hat.”
–Wurt
“Woah, that's a lot of wings for one hat!”
–Walter
“A few wings is nothing, I once saw a hat with an entire pheasant on top.”
–Wanda
The Commander's Helm is a wearable head slot Armor, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid after unlocking the Commander's Helm Skill and needs 2 Gold Nuggets, 2 Beefalo Wool and 1 Marble to craft.
The Commander's Helm has a durability of 683 and absorbs 80% of all physical Damage. It also protects Wigfrid from getting knockbacked by attacks.
Skill Upgrades[edit | edit source]
When Commander's Helm Enhancement I is unlocked, the Helm offers +8 Planar Protection.
When Commander's Helm Enhancement II is unlocked, Wigfrid's natural healing ability will repair her Commander's Helm when she continues to fight at maximum health.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ chỉ huy là một loại Áo giáp có thể đeo trên đầu, độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wigfrid sau khi mở khóa Kỹ năng Mũ chỉ huy và cần 2 Vàng Thỏi, 2 Lông Bò Lai và 1 Cẩm Thạch để chế tạo.
title: Commander's Helm
